name: Deep Horrors of Fishing
short_description: DHoF is a fishing game that involves catching monstrous creatures that are lurking beneath. Armed with a fishing rod, bait, and a fragile boat, players must fish up everything in the deep. Players will encounter grotesque fish with their own rarity and items. Will you dare reel these up?
detailed_description:
Every cast could bring forth unspeakable creatures from the depths in "Deep Horrors of Fishing"!

This fishing game features:

•Different locations to fish in (over a dozen)!

•A boat for shallow water and a ship for deep water!

•A few kinds of different fishing rods. Wow!

•More than +40 different horror fish to catch! *WE ADDED MORE!*

•Item Book (lists all items) & Fishing Book (lists all fish) to collect!

•Traditional turn-based combat!

AND more!!
